subject: Disable stats port for haproxy
commit_message:
Disable stats port for haproxy

Issue-ID: AAI-2395
Change-Id: If4ef519a85c4f29e56251b665bbef4de860a64a7
Signed-off-by: Harish Venkata Kajur <vk250x@att.com>
